creator: kaoru@kaisei.org
text:
ports/devel/subversion make patch failed with -DWITH_SVNSERVE_WRAPPER.
Please update files/build-outputs.mk.patch for subversion 1.4.0.

Fix: Fix files/build-outputs.mk.patch.
How-To-Repeat: % cd /usr/ports/devel/subversion
% sudo make -DWITH_SVNSERVE_WRAPPER clean patch
